summary: Full e2e testing of InnerVoice app - all 17 backend tests passed, all frontend flows verified working

issues: After goal is created and page refreshed, goal appears then disappears (possible timing issue but could be unrelated - toast 'Goal created' shown). On reload shows 'No active goals' briefly. This may be a display/refresh issue where just-created goal from prior session isn't shown due to localStorage clear. Not confirmed as a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: GoalUpdateRequest.update checks `if v is not None` which means you cannot set completed=False if it was True (since False is falsy). Bug: completed toggle to false may fail. Line 380: `{k: v for k, v in req.dict().items() if v is not None}` - False is not None so this works, but progress=0 would be filtered out. Minor bug.
JWT secret has a default value 'conscience-ai-secret' hardcoded as fallback - security concern
seed_data_creation: Registered test@innervoice.com with Test1234, completed onboarding with values [Honesty, Compassion, Growth], personality Introspective & thoughtful
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows tested and working: Landing, Auth, Onboarding (3 steps), Chat (AI response working), Daily Check-in, Goals CRUD, Moral Dilemma analysis, Profile page, Auth protection/redirect. Test user: test@innervoice.com / Test1234 (onboarded). Backend API 100% pass rate.
rca_of_issues: Minor: GoalUpdateRequest uses `if v is not None` filter on line 380 - progress=0 would be excluded from update (cannot set progress to 0 explicitly). However `completed=False` does work since False is not None.
